title: Dacha
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''dacha''' was a vacation house.

[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] owned a dacha on the shore of [[Lake Sah'ot]], on her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].
